channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's 24-hour truce with the media
item.description: One uncomfortable question ended truce less than 24 hours after WHCD shooting.

item.title: How carbon removal tech adapts to Trump's energy agenda
item.description: Industry reframes pitch around energy dominance instead of climate change.

item.title: Iran offers U.S. deal to reopen strait but postpone nuclear talks
item.description: Proposal to end war and reopen Strait of Hormuz, with nuclear talks delayed.

item.title: Trump lashes out at '60 Minutes' over gunman manifesto questions
item.description: President called Norah O'Donnell 'disgraceful' during interview.
